title: Tutorial 01: Next.js + Clerk — Wallet App
body:
**Hey May!** This is THE foundation. The first thing any developer sees when they try Chipi. If a developer in Colombia or Nigeria can follow this and have a working wallet in 5 minutes, we win. If something breaks, you're catching it before hundreds of developers hit it. Every bug you find here saves us users. Every feature that passes becomes a CLI template that ships worldwide. This is where Chipi's developer ecosystem starts — with your validation.

## Framework: Next.js (App Router)
## Auth Provider: Clerk

## Docs pages to follow (in order)

1. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/gasless-quickstart
2. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/gasless-clerk-setup
3. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/use-passkeys
4. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-create-wallet
5. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-get-wallet
6. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-get-token-balance
7. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-transfer
8. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-get-transaction-list
9. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-get-transaction-status
10. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-migrate-wallet-to-passkey

## Features to test

- [ ] Sign in / sign up with Clerk
- [ ] Create wallet with passkey (WebAuthn prompt appears)
- [ ] View wallet address
- [ ] View USDC balance (even if 0)
- [ ] Send USDC to another address gaslessly
- [ ] View transaction history (list)
- [ ] Check transaction status
- [ ] Receive: display address + QR code
- [ ] Add/rotate passkey

## Hooks to exercise (must appear in your code)

- `useCreateWallet`
- `useGetWallet`
- `useChipiWallet`
- `useGetTokenBalance`
- `useTransfer`
- `useGetTransactionList`
- `useGetTransactionStatus`
- `useMigrateWalletToPasskey`
- `createWalletPasskey`

## When something doesn't work

1. Screenshot the error
2. File a bug in the **correct repo** (see Task 0 for the repo table). When filing, remember to include the exact docs URL you were following and what went wrong. This is critical — comment **passkey-pioneer** on this issue when you're done to unlock Tutorial 02.
3. Link the bug issue in the comments here
4. Mark it as FAIL in your VALIDATION.md
5. Keep going with the next feature

## Deliverables

- [ ] Working project in `tutorials/01-nextjs-clerk-wallet/`
- [ ] Clean clone works: `git clone → npm install → npm run build → npm run dev`
- [ ] `VALIDATION.md` (copy from `.github/VALIDATION_TEMPLATE.md`, fill in pass/fail)
- [ ] Every hook above is used in source code
- [ ] Recording: 5-8 min video (see `.github/RECORDING_SCRIPT.md`)
- [ ] All bugs found filed as issues (linked in comments)
- [ ] YouTube video link in PR description

## Use case ideas (mention in your recording)

- Personal finance dashboard for tracking crypto savings
- Simple payment app for a small business
- Remittance app for sending money to family

## Your impact

After this tutorial, any developer can build a wallet app from scratch with Chipi. This becomes the default Next.js template in `create-chipi-app`.
